meta.title: The Cab | Control tower for on-chain capital
meta.description: The Cab gives Aerodrome users a precise cockpit for monitoring wallet exposure, pool participation, strategies, rewards, governance activity, and historical capital flow.

hero.title: A control tower for your on-chain capital.
hero.body: The Cab gives Aerodrome users a precise cockpit for monitoring wallet exposure, pool participation, manual deposits, Mellow strategies, rewards, governance activity, and historical capital flow.
hero.support: Connect your wallet for a fast overview, then run historical analysis to unlock deeper pool, deposit, strategy, rewards, governance, and activity views.

value.eyebrow: DeFi data is visible. Meaning is harder.
value.heading: Wallet history was not designed to explain portfolio performance.
value.body: Aerodrome activity can span pools, gauges, manual deposits, Mellow strategies, claims, votes, swaps, withdrawals, and residual balances. Standard wallet history shows transactions. The Cab reconstructs the operational picture behind them.

poolExposure.title: Pool exposure gets fragmented
poolExposure.body: Capital can move between deposits, residual wallet balances, rebalances, and new positions. The Cab keeps pool-level exposure visible instead of treating every withdrawal as a complete exit.

strategies.title: Strategies are not manual deposits
strategies.body: Mellow strategies use wrappers, shares, rewards contracts, and their own coverage model. The Cab separates automated strategy exposure from manual Aerodrome deposits.

rewards.title: Rewards need attribution
rewards.body: Claims, fees, bribes, and governance rewards only become useful when they are tied back to pools, deposits, strategies, or votes.

activity.title: Activity needs interpretation
activity.body: A swap may be a normal trade, a rebalance, a liquidation, or part of a residual attribution flow. The Cab labels activity with context and confidence.

productPromise.heading: From wallet activity to operational portfolio intelligence.
productPromise.body: The Cab turns raw wallet activity into a structured model of your Aerodrome portfolio: pools, deposits, strategies, rewards, governance, activity, and coverage.

overview.title: Fast wallet overview
overview.body: Connect your wallet and get an immediate view of balances, recent activity, market values, deployed capital, idle assets, and analysis status.

pools.title: Pool-level exposure
pools.body: See each Aerodrome pool as a market-level cockpit: manual deposits, automated strategies, rewards, residual balances, and activity grouped by pool.

deposits.title: Manual deposit lifecycle
deposits.body: Track direct Aerodrome deposits from mint and liquidity changes through staking, claims, withdrawals, and closure.

strategies.title: Automated strategy accounting
strategies.body: Analyze Mellow exposure through wrappers, shares, StakingRewards, deposits, withdrawals, claims, and coverage status.

rewards.title: Reward attribution
rewards.body: Understand claimed value by source: manual deposits, strategies, governance fees, bribes, rebases, and pool-linked rewards.

governance.title: veAERO and voting returns
governance.body: Monitor locks, votes, relays, voting fees, bribes, and governance reward flows without mixing them into deposit performance.

howItWorks.title: Fast first. Deep when requested.
howItWorks.body: The Cab starts with a quick wallet overview, then runs a non-blocking historical analysis when you request deeper analytics. You can keep using the dashboard while the analysis runs.

connectWallet.title: Connect wallet
connectWallet.body: Connect with WalletConnect. Product v1 supports Base mainnet and uses your connected wallet as the analysis scope.

quickOverview.title: Get the quick overview
quickOverview.body: The Cab uses wallet balances, recent history, and market prices to show an immediate portfolio cockpit while deeper analysis remains optional.

historicalAnalysis.title: Run historical analysis
historicalAnalysis.body: Trigger a background analysis that reconstructs Aerodrome and Mellow activity across pools, deposits, strategies, rewards, governance, and wallet movements.

unlockSections.title: Unlock deep sections
unlockSections.body: When the run is ready, the connected app unlocks Pools, Deposits, Strategies, Rewards, Governance, and Activity with normalized data and coverage indicators.

refreshStale.title: Refresh when stale
refreshStale.body: If the last analysis is more than a week old, The Cab can refresh in the background while preserving the last successful data.

modelClarity.heading: Pools, deposits, and strategies are connected, not collapsed.
modelClarity.body: The Cab separates market exposure from manual position lifecycle and automated strategy accounting. This keeps analytics clear when capital flows through Aerodrome pools, direct deposits, Mellow wrappers, rewards, and residual balances.

pool.title: Pool
pool.body: A pool is the market-level venue, such as WETH/cbBTC or AERO/USDC. Pool views aggregate manual deposits, automated strategies, rewards, residual balances, and activity for that market.

deposit.title: Deposit
deposit.body: A deposit is direct user-owned exposure inside an Aerodrome pool. The Cab tracks its lifecycle through liquidity changes, staking, claims, withdrawals, and closure.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.body: A strategy is automated exposure, initially focused on Mellow. It has its own wrapper, shares, rewards, coverage, and accounting model, while still contributing to the underlying pool aggregate.

activityIntelligence.heading: Raw transactions become explainable activity.
activityIntelligence.body: The Cab turns wallet activity into classified ledger events: deposits, withdrawals, swaps, claims, stakes, votes, rebalances, strategy movements, liquidations, cash-ins, and cash-outs.

rebalanceDetection.title: Rebalance detection
rebalanceDetection.body: A swap between tokens of the same pool may be classified as a rebalance when it consumes residual pool-attributed balances.

residualAttribution.title: Residual attribution
residualAttribution.body: Withdrawn pool tokens remain attributed to their pool until a later movement resolves them as redeployed, rebalanced, liquidated, transferred, or still waiting.

sourceWaterfall.title: Source waterfall
sourceWaterfall.body: When a swap exceeds one pool's residual balance, The Cab allocates the excess across cash-ins, liquidation-derived inventory, and other residual states instead of over-attributing it.

trust.heading: Connect for analysis. Not execution.
trust.body: The Cab is a monitoring and analytics surface. Product v1 does not execute trades, move funds, or require manual reconciliation. It reads wallet activity, reconstructs portfolio context, and displays coverage-aware analytics.
trust.title: Trust boundaries stay visible.
trust.support: Wallet access is used for read-only analytics only. The Cab does not custody private keys and keeps execution outside the landing experience.

readOnlyAnalytics.label: Read-only analytics
readOnlyAnalytics.body: The connected wallet scopes the analysis, but product v1 stays focused on monitoring and interpretation.

noPrivateKeyCustody.label: No private-key custody
noPrivateKeyCustody.body: The Cab never asks for private keys and does not custody signing authority to reconstruct portfolio history.

noTransactionExecution.label: No transaction execution
noTransactionExecution.body: The Cab does not trade, move funds, or execute wallet actions as part of the landing or analysis flow.

coverageVisible.label: Coverage shown openly
coverageVisible.body: When data is partial, share-level, or unknown, the limitation stays visible instead of being hidden behind false precision.

coverage.heading: Precision includes knowing what is partial.
coverage.body: The Cab does not hide uncertainty. Strategy accounting, provider data, pricing, protocol mappings, and decoded activity can be marked as full, share-level, partial, limited, or unknown depending on evidence.

full.title: Full
full.body: The event or metric is reconstructed from reliable protocol evidence, token movements, pricing, and known mappings.

shareLevel.title: Share-level
shareLevel.body: User-level strategy exposure is reliable, but internal strategy mechanics are not fully reconstructed.

partial.title: Partial
partial.body: Some events, prices, mappings, or historical context are missing. The metric is useful but should be read with limitations.

unknown.title: Unknown
unknown.body: The activity was detected, but The Cab cannot classify it confidently enough to present it as a reliable metric.

cta.heading: Bring your Aerodrome portfolio into the cockpit.
cta.body: Connect your wallet, inspect the current state, and run historical analysis when you need the full operational picture.
cta.supportText: Wallet connection remains read-only in product v1 and keeps Base mainnet as the supported analysis scope.

walletState.unsupportedChain: Connected wallet is on an unsupported network
